DISCOVERY, 610, DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA PACIFIC MEDICAL CENTER INC.'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO INTERROGATORIES AND FOR SANCTIONS -- CONTINUED TO JANUARY 24, 2005 AT 10:30 A.M. PER MOVING PARTY. COMM: BRUCE E. CHAN
DECLARATION OF FLADSETH IN SUPP OF OPPOSITION TO CAL PACIFIC'S MTN TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO INTEROGGS & FOR SANCTIONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF WHITNEY, LYNDA M WHITNEY, PETER
ORDER GRANTING MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO INTERROGATORIES AND FOR SANCTIONS

DISCOVERY 610, APPEARANCES: STANLEY M. WESSELS FOR DEFENDANT AND MOVING PARTY: CALIFORNIA MEDICAL CENTER INC. MARTA GUZMAN FOR PLAINTIFF AND OPPOSING PARTY: LINDA M. WHITNEY HEARING HELD AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: NO OPPOSITION HAVING BEEN FILED, DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, SET #2, FROM PLAINTIFF PETER WHITNEY AND SET #4, FROM PLAINTIFF LYNDA WHITNEY IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFFS ARE ORDERED TO PROVIDE FURTHER OR AMENDED RESPONSES WITHIN 14 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. PLAINTIFFS ARE ORDERED TO PROVIDE VERIFICATIONS TO ALL RESPONSES WITHIN 14 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. FAILURE TO RESPOND TO DEFENDANT'S ATTEMPT TO MEET AND CONFER WAS A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. MONETARY SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $456.30 ARE TO BE PAID WITHIN 14 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. BRUCE E. CHAN.
